source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/05 Texture Memory

evidences.content: 过去我曾提到过纹理记忆。 So I've mentioned texture memory in the past. 通常情况下，这是会让机器崩溃的第一件事。 Usually this is the first thing to go in what will crash your machine a lot of times. 标准版 RTX 3080 的显存为 8 G，而 3090 的显存为 24 G。 The standard RTX 3080 is 8 gigs of VRAM, but the 3090 is 24 gigs of VRAM. 因此，3090 可能是最好的标准，你可以有更多的选择余地。 So 3090s are probably the best standard where you have a lot more latitude. 您有三倍的空间在场景中添加纹理，这些纹理可以是 You have three times the space in your scene to add in textures that are either 更高的分辨率或更多的物体。 higher resolution or just way more objects. 但我想告诉你如何在场景中检查纹理内存。 But I want to show you how to check your texture memory in your scene. 因此，现在我们可以同时看到所有东西。 So right now we have everything visible at the same time. 因此，让我们进入工具，然后下拉到审核和统计。 So let's go into tools and then drop down to audit and statistics. 因此，这个统计菜单将有一个下拉菜单，名为 "纹理统计"。 So this statistics menu is going to have a drop down called texture stats. 因此，如果我们选择该选项，就能获得整个场景的信息，并查看加载了多少内存。 So if we select that, we get information for our entire scene and we can see how much memory is loaded. 然后，我们还可以根据场景中所有纹理的大小进行排序。 And then we can also sort by the size of all the textures in our scene. 因此，我们可以看到有几个 8k 的纹理。 So we can see that we have a couple 8k textures. 关于最大维度和当前维度，有一点你应该知道 And one thing you should know about the max dimension and current dimension 在场景中使用 8k 纹理并不意味着它已被加载。 is just because you have an 8k texture in your scene doesn't mean that that is loaded. 因此，这里我们有一个 8k 的纹理，但实际上它只加载了一个 512 x 512 的图像。 So here we have an 8k texture, but it's actually only loading a 512 by 512 image. 这是因为场景中的任何正方形图像都有一种叫做 mipmaps 的东西、 And that's because any square image in your scene has something called mipmaps, 基本上就是纹理的 LOD。 which are basically LODs for textures. 因此，如果您打开任何纹理，就会看到我们的 mip 中有这样一个细节级别下拉菜单 So if you open any texture, you'll see that we have this level of detail drop down in our mip 设置。因此，贴图或细节级别设置对纹理的意义都是一样的。 settings. So mipmaps or level of detail settings all mean the same thing for textures. 因此，很多时候你可以强制它保持最高 mipmap、 So a lot of times you can force it to stay at the highest mipmap, 或者，我也可以把它改成三个。 or I could change this to something like three. 现在你可以看到，它将加载第三个 mipmap，比原来小三倍。 And now you can see it'll load the third mipmap, which is three multiples smaller. 如果我把它设为 1，它就只有一半大。 If I set it to one, it'll be half as big. 如果我把它设为 2，它就只有四分之一大。 If I set it to two, it'll be a quarter as big. 如果我把它设为 3，它就会有原始纹理的八分之一大。 If I set it to three, it'll be an eighth as big as the original texture. 请记住这一点。 Just keep that in mind. 如果您想强制降低这些参数，您可以使用 Echo 或我们常用的 If you ever want to force these lower, which you may want to do with Echo or our common 榛树。在这里，我可以点击任何一棵树。 hazel trees. So right here, I can just click on any of these. 在这里，我可以点击法线贴图。 So here I can click on the normal map. 我可以把所有这些常见的榛子地图设置为 4k 而不是 8k，这样就能帮我们解决问题了。 I could set all these common hazel maps to 4k instead of 8k just to help us out. 并开始限制它们的大小。 And start to limit how big these are. 目前，我使用的是 3080，所以这台机器的纹理内存有限。 At the moment, I'm using a 3080, so I am limited on the texture memory on this machine. 因此，我要将其设置为 1，然后返回并确保保存所有这些资产。 So I'm going to set that to one and then just go back and make sure to save all of these assets. 您确实需要保存它们，以便在场景中产生效果。 You do need to save them for this to make an effect in your scene. 如果我按 T-Echo 排序，你可以看到这里有大量的 4k 地图，仅 Echo 就有 And if I sort by T-Echo, you can see that there are a ton of 4k maps just here for Echo as a 性格因此，如果我想优化这一点，首先要做的就是强制这些 character. So the first thing I would attack if I'm trying to optimize this and just force these 如果纹理要低很多，我可能会把 AO 纹理缩小到非常小的程度、 textures to be a lot lower, I would probably reduce the AO textures to something really small, 比如 1k 而不是 4k。接下来我要减少的是 ORM 地图。 like 1k instead of 4k. The next thing I would reduce would be the ORM maps. 最后两个是漫反射或基色和法线。 And then the last two would be our diffuse or base color and the normals. 您希望尽可能保持较高的细节，尤其是我们的法线。 Those you want to keep as high detail as possible, especially our normals. 因此，我会最后攻击这些地方。 So I would attack those last. 但我们可以查看场景中加载的内容，然后 But we can see what's loaded in our scene and then 当前使用的内存以及满载内存的大小。 the current memory used and what the fully loaded memory is. 所以这里是 1.4 G。 So here it's 1.4 gigs. 在这里，我们做得还不错。我们没有装入太多东西。 So here we're actually doing all right. We don't have too many things loaded in. 但是，根据您机器的硬件情况，您可能需要降低这个值，或者您可能只是 But depending on the hardware of your machine, you might need to lower this or you might just 你会意识到，嘿，我们可以在场景中添加更多的对象，我们可以把它推得更远。 realize, hey, we have a lot more objects we can add into the scene and we can push this a lot further. 但现在我们知道，我们的场景内目前没有任何问题。 But now we know that we have no issues with what's currently inside of our scene. 因此，只要不导入任何新纹理，我们就可以正常工作了。 So as long as you don't import any new textures, we should be good to go.
evidences.speaker: instructor
